name: zd-signature-input-workspace
description: Workspace para desenvolvimento e publicacao do componente Zeedhi ZdSignatureInput.
author: Marcelo Teixeira <marcelo.teixeira@teknisa.com>

scripts.serve: npm run build:common && vue-cli-service serve demo/main.ts
scripts.serve:8081: npm run build:common && vue-cli-service serve demo/main.ts --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8081
scripts.build: npm run build:common && npm run build:vue
scripts.build:vue: ZD_SIGNATURE_LIB_BUILD=true vue-cli-service build --target lib --name signature-input-vue --dest packages/vue/dist packages/vue/src/index.ts && tsc -p packages/vue/tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir packages/vue/types && node scripts/fix-vue-types.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run check:package-files && npm run pack:dry-run
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm pack --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input-common --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input-vue --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input --dry-run
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm publish --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input-common --dry-run && npm publish --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input-vue --dry-run && npm publish --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input --dry-run
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build && npm publish --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input-common && npm publish --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input-vue && npm publish --workspace @marcelodl49/zd-signature-input
